effectsPage.title: Minecraft effects

generator.yamlNoFile: Load a .yml or .json file to edit string values. Structure is preserved on download (JSON is pretty-printed to match indentation when possible).
generator.yamlPreviewLinked: Field "{path}" is linked to the preview. Colors and format update this YAML value.
generator.yamlExpandDisabled: Load a valid YAML or JSON file with string fields first

serverPage.title: Main server settings panel
serverPage.subtitle: Edit key Paper/Spigot/Bukkit settings and copy ready config blocks for each file.
serverPage.customEditorHint: This file is not from preset templates. You can edit full text and download it back.
serverPage.loadedFileHint: File loaded - changes are applied to real content.
serverPage.templateHint: You can work with template defaults or upload your own file for precise editing.
serverPage.logSearchPlaceholder: Search in log: plugin name, player, stack trace...
serverPage.logIssuesEmpty: No obvious startup issues found in this log.
serverPage.logModsEmpty: No mod list found in this log.
serverPage.logResourcepacksEmpty: No resource packs found in this log.

logIssueHint.auth: Check launcher authentication and system time. A valid Mojang/Microsoft token is required for premium login.
logIssueHint.realms: Realms is unavailable or token is invalid. If you do not use Realms, this can be ignored.
logIssueHint.class_missing: Usually a mod conflict or missing dependency. Check mod versions against your Minecraft/Fabric version.
logIssueHint.dependency: A recommended mod or library is missing. Install the mentioned dependency.
logIssueHint.version: Mod version format or compatibility does not match the loader expectations. Use a compatible build.
logIssueHint.resourcepack: There is a resource pack issue. Check that the file exists and the name/path is correct.
logIssueHint.settings: A value is outside the allowed range. Set it back to a valid value.
logIssueHint.network: Check network connectivity and access to the target service/server, then retry.
logIssueHint.other: Inspect this line together with nearby log lines around the same time.

serverPage.nothingFound: Nothing found - adjust filters or search text.
